name: Chocolate-Coconut Squares
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup butter or margarine, at room temperature
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the butter and 1/2 cup of the brown sugar until smooth. Add 1 cup of the flour and combine until the mixture forms coarse crumbs. Press the dough into an 8- or 9-inch square glass baking dish.
2. Microwave on 100% power for 3 to 5 minutes, rotating the dish if necessary for even doneness. The crust should lose all moist spots and look like a cooked pie shell (it will not brown).
3. Combine the eggs, vanilla, nuts, coconut, chocolate chips, remaining flour, and remaining brown sugar.
4. Spread the mixture over the crust. Microwave on 100% power for 4 to 5 minutes, rotating the dish if necessary for even doneness.
5. Cool on a wire rack, then cut into squares.
Makes 16 squares.
Note: You can substitute butterscotch chips for the chocolate, or use a combination of both.
